about.bio.1: My curiosity centers on how complex systems serve real people. Whether designing digital products, streamlining operational workflows, or aligning teams around a shared vision, I focus on translating business strategy into experiences that clinicians, providers, and customers can rely on every day.
about.bio.2: Colleagues consistently note that my strongest contributions are bridging technical depth with clear communication—connecting product, engineering, research, and leadership to deliver measurable outcomes.
about.quote.text: Great product design connects human needs, business outcomes, and scalable systems.
about.title: Product Design Leadership for Complex Systems
about.value.0.desc: Every initiative begins with understanding clinicians, operators, and customers so solutions solve the right problems.

about.value.3.desc: Design should create measurable improvements in adoption, efficiency, and long-term product growth.
